targets.queryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, contributions_total, withdrawals_total, dividends_total_received, trades_total_count FROM period_activity ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, contributions_total, withdrawals_total, dividends_total_received, trades_total_count FROM period_activity ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, contribution_date, amount, account_id FROM period_contributions ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, contribution_date DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, contribution_date, amount, account_id FROM period_contributions ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, contribution_date DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, withdrawal_date, amount, account_id FROM period_withdrawals ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, withdrawal_date DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, withdrawal_date, amount, account_id FROM period_withdrawals ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, withdrawal_date DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, symbol, buy_count, sell_count FROM period_trades ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, symbol LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, symbol, buy_count, sell_count FROM period_trades ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, symbol LIMIT 5
